You are a senior .NET engineer and DevOps expert.

Goal:
Automate containerization and modernization of an existing .NET Core Web API project.

Tasks:

1. Dockerization
- Add a Dockerfile to the root of the project
- Follow this template strictly: https://github.com/stalin-labs/aks-api/blob/main/Dockerfile
- Ensure:
  - Multi-stage build
  - Optimized image size
  - Proper port exposure
  - Environment variables supported

2. GitHub Workflow

- Add a GitHub Actions workflow under `.github/workflows/build.yml`

- Use this template EXACTLY as base: https://github.com/stalin-labs/aks-api/blob/main/.github/workflows/build.yml

- DO NOT modify any logic, steps, or structure in the template.

- Only replace the following variables:
  1. imageName
  2. acrName
  3. repositoryName

- Ensure:
  - YAML syntax remains valid
  - Secrets and variables are not altered
  - No additional steps are introduced

- Output:
  - Final `build.yml` file with only the required values replaced

3. NuGet Upgrade
- Identify outdated NuGet packages
- Upgrade to latest stable versions
- Ensure no breaking changes (fix code if required)

4. Database Detection & Health Checks
- Detect if project uses:
  - MS SQL Server
  - PostgreSQL
- Based on detection:
  - Add appropriate health checks
  - Add required NuGet packages (e.g., AspNetCore.HealthChecks.*)
  - Configure health check endpoints: `/health`

5. Code Changes
- Register health checks in `Program.cs`
- Ensure application runs without errors after changes

6. Validation
- Ensure:
  - Project builds successfully
  - Docker image builds successfully
  - No runtime errors

7. Pull Request
- Create a new branch: `feature/containerization-automation`
- Commit changes with clear messages
- Raise a Pull Request with:
  - Summary of changes
  - List of upgraded packages
  - Health check details
  - Any assumptions made

Output Format:
- Show all added/modified files
- Provide explanations only where necessary
- Keep changes minimal and production-ready
